边缘计算与物联网.title: At the Edge of the Heart: ULP FPGA-Based CNN for On-Device Cardiac Feature Extraction in Smart Health Sensors for Astronauts
边缘计算与物联网.title_zh: 心脏边缘：基于超低功耗FPGA的CNN在宇航员智能健康传感器中的设备端心脏特征提取
边缘计算与物联网.summary: The convergence of accelerating human spaceflight ambitions and critical terrestrial health monitoring demands is driving unprecedented requirements for reliable, real-time feature extraction on extremely resource-constrained wearable health sensors. We present an ultra-low-power (ULP) Field-Program
边缘计算与物联网.summary_zh: 随着人类太空飞行目标的加速推进以及地面健康监测需求的日益增长，对资源极度受限的可穿戴健康传感器上可靠、实时特征提取的要求达到了前所未有的高度。本文提出了一种基于超低功耗现场可编程门阵列的卷积神经网络，用于在设备端完成心脏特征提取。该设计针对宇航员健康监测场景，在极低功耗下实现实时处理，核心创新在于将神经网络推理与硬件加速相结合，在保持高精度的同时显著降低能耗，为极端环境下的智能健康传感提供了可行方案。

边缘计算与物联网.title: QAROO: AI-Driven Online Task Offloading for Energy-Efficient and Sustainable MEC Networks
边缘计算与物联网.title_zh: QAROO：面向节能可持续MEC网络的AI驱动在线任务卸载
边缘计算与物联网.summary: With the rapid advancement of artificial intelligence (AI) and intelligent science, intelligent edge computing has been widely adopted. However, the limitations of traditional methods, such as poor adaptability and the slow convergence of heuristic algorithms, are becoming increasingly evident. To e
边缘计算与物联网.summary_zh: 随着人工智能和智能科学的快速发展，智能边缘计算得到了广泛应用。然而，传统方法如启发式算法在适应性和收敛速度方面存在明显局限。为此，本文提出QAROO，一种AI驱动的在线任务卸载框架，旨在实现移动边缘计算网络的节能与可持续性。该框架利用强化学习动态优化卸载决策，在降低能耗的同时保证服务质量，为绿色边缘计算提供了新的解决方案。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Marco-MoE: Open Multilingual Mixture-of-Expert Language Models with Efficient Upcycling
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: Marco-MoE：基于高效升级循环的开放多语言混合专家语言模型
大语言模型/LLM.summary: We present Marco-MoE, a suite of fully open multilingual sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models. Marco-MoE features a highly sparse design in which only around 5\% of the total parameters are activated per input token. This extreme sparsity, combined with upcycling from dense models, enables efficie
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 本文提出Marco-MoE，一套完全开放的多语言稀疏混合专家模型。该模型采用高度稀疏设计，每个输入标记仅激活约5%的总参数。这种极端稀疏性结合从稠密模型升级循环的策略，实现了高效的训练和推理。Marco-MoE在多语言任务上表现出色，显著降低了计算开销，同时保持了与稠密模型相当的性能，为多语言自然语言处理提供了经济高效的解决方案。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Luminol-AIDetect: Fast Zero-shot Machine-Generated Text Detection based on Perplexity under Text Shuffling
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: Luminol-AIDetect：基于文本打乱下困惑度的快速零样本机器生成文本检测
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Machine-generated text (MGT) detection requires identifying structurally invariant signals across generation models, rather than relying on model-specific fingerprints. In this respect, we hypothesize that while large language models excel at local semantic consistency, their autoregressive nature r
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 机器生成文本检测需要识别跨生成模型的结构不变信号，而非依赖模型特定指纹。本文假设，尽管大语言模型擅长局部语义一致性，但其自回归本质导致在文本打乱后困惑度出现显著变化。基于此，提出Luminol-AIDetect，一种快速零样本检测方法，通过计算打乱文本的困惑度来区分机器生成文本与人类写作。该方法无需训练，计算高效，且对未见过的生成模型具有良好泛化能力，为机器文本检测提供了实用工具。

大语言模型/LLM.title: From CRUD to Autonomous Agents: Formal Validation and Zero-Trust Security for Semantic Gateways in AI-Native Enterprise Systems
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 从CRUD到自主代理：AI原生企业系统中语义网关的形式化验证与零信任安全
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Enterprise software engineering is shifting away from deterministic CRUD/REST architectures toward AI-native systems where large language models act as cognitive orchestrators. This transition introduces a critical security tension: probabilistic LLMs weaken classical mechanisms for validation, access control, and audit. This paper proposes a formal framework for validating semantic gateways that mediate LLM interactions with enterprise data and services, incorporating zero-trust principles to ensure security despite probabilistic behavior.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 企业软件工程正从确定的CRUD/REST架构转向AI原生系统，其中大语言模型充当认知编排器。这一转变引入了关键的安全张力：概率性LLM削弱了经典的验证、访问控制和审计机制。本文提出了一种形式化框架，用于验证中介LLM与企业数据和服务交互的语义网关，融合零信任原则以确保在概率行为下的安全性。创新点在于将形式化验证与零信任安全结合，为AI原生企业系统提供安全保障。

大语言模型/LLM.title: From Soliloquy to Agora: Memory-Enhanced LLM Agents with Decentralized Debate for Optimization Modeling
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 从独白到广场：具有去中心化辩论的记忆增强LLM代理用于优化建模
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Optimization modeling underpins real-world decision-making in logistics, manufacturing, energy, and public services, but reliably solving such problems from natural-language requirements remains challenging for current large language models (LLMs). In this paper, we propose Agora-Opt, a modular framework that enhances LLM agents with memory and decentralized debate mechanisms. Multiple agents iteratively generate and refine optimization models through structured debate, leveraging shared memory to retain successful strategies. Experiments show significant improvements over single-agent approaches in solving complex optimization problems from natural language descriptions.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 优化建模支撑着物流、制造、能源和公共服务等领域的实际决策，但当前大语言模型从自然语言需求中可靠地解决此类问题仍具挑战。本文提出Agora-Opt，一种模块化框架，通过记忆和去中心化辩论机制增强LLM代理。多个代理通过结构化辩论迭代生成并优化优化模型，利用共享记忆保留成功策略。实验表明，在从自然语言描述中解决复杂优化问题上，该方法显著优于单代理方法。创新点在于引入多代理辩论和记忆机制，提高了LLM在优化建模任务中的可靠性和性能。

大语言模型/LLM.title: ADEMA: A Knowledge-State Orchestration Architecture for Long-Horizon Knowledge Synthesis with LLMAgents
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: ADEMA：面向LLM智能体长周期知识合成的知识状态编排架构
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Long-horizon LLM tasks often fail not because a single answer is unattainable, but because knowledge states drift across rounds, intermediate commitments remain implicit, and interruption fractures the evolving evidence chain. This paper presents ADEMA as a knowledge-state orchestration architecture that explicitly tracks and manages knowledge states during multi-turn interactions. ADEMA maintains a structured knowledge graph, detects state drift, and triggers re-evaluation when inconsistencies arise. Experiments on complex reasoning and synthesis tasks show that ADEMA significantly improves task completion rate and answer consistency compared to baseline LLM agents.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 长周期LLM任务失败的原因往往不是无法获得单个答案，而是因为知识状态在多轮交互中漂移、中间承诺保持隐式、中断破坏了不断演化的证据链。本文提出ADEMA作为一种知识状态编排架构，在多轮交互中显式跟踪和管理知识状态。ADEMA维护一个结构化的知识图谱，检测状态漂移，并在出现不一致时触发重新评估。在复杂推理和合成任务上的实验表明，与基线LLM智能体相比，ADEMA显著提高了任务完成率和答案一致性。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Investigation into In-Context Learning Capabilities of Transformers
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Transformers have demonstrated a strong ability for in-context learning (ICL), enabling models to solve previously unseen tasks using only example input output pairs provided at inference time. While prior theoretical work has established conditions under which transformers can perform linear classification via ICL, many questions remain about the mechanisms underlying more complex tasks. In this paper, we conduct a systematic investigation into the ICL capabilities of transformers across a range of synthetic and real-world tasks. We analyze how factors such as model depth, attention heads, and training data distribution affect ICL performance. Our experiments reveal that transformers can learn non-linear decision boundaries through ICL, and that the effectiveness of ICL is highly dependent on the structure of the in-context examples. We also identify limitations, particularly in tasks requiring compositional reasoning. Our findings provide insights into the inner workings of ICL and suggest directions for improving transformer architectures.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 本文系统探究了Transformer的上下文学习（ICL）能力。尽管已有理论表明Transformer可通过ICL执行线性分类，但复杂任务的机制尚不明确。创新点：1) 在合成和真实任务上全面分析ICL表现；2) 发现Transformer能通过ICL学习非线性决策边界；3) 揭示模型深度、注意力头数、训练数据分布对ICL性能的影响；4) 指出ICL在组合推理任务中的局限性。主要贡献是为理解ICL的内部机制提供了实证基础，并指出了改进Transformer架构的方向。

大语言模型/LLM.title: How Fast Should a Model Commit to Supervision? Training Reasoning Models on the Tsallis Loss Continuum
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 模型应以多快速度承诺监督？在Tsallis损失连续统上训练推理模型
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Adapting reasoning models to new tasks during post-training with only output-level supervision stalls under reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards (RLVR) when the initial success probability $p_0$ is small. Using the Tsallis $q$-logarithm, we define a loss family $J_Q$ that interpolates between the log loss and the squared error loss. We show that the optimal $q$ depends on $p_0$, and propose a dynamic scheduling strategy that adjusts $q$ during training to accelerate convergence.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 在仅有输出级监督的后训练阶段，将推理模型适应新任务时，若初始成功概率p0较小，基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）会陷入停滞。利用Tsallis q-对数，我们定义了一个损失函数族J_Q，该函数族在对数损失和平方误差损失之间插值。我们证明了最优q取决于p0，并提出了一种动态调度策略，在训练过程中调整q以加速收敛。

AI安全与治理.title: Think Before You Act -- A Neurocognitive Governance Model for Autonomous AI Agents
AI安全与治理.title_zh: 三思而后行——面向自主AI智能体的神经认知治理模型
AI安全与治理.summary: The rapid deployment of autonomous AI agents across enterprise, healthcare, and safety-critical environments has created a fundamental governance gap. Existing approaches, runtime guardrails, training-time alignment, and post-hoc auditing treat governance as an external constraint rather than an int
AI安全与治理.summary_zh: 自主AI智能体在企业、医疗和安全关键环境中的快速部署造成了根本性的治理鸿沟。现有方法如运行时防护、训练时对齐和事后审计，将治理视为外部约束而非内部机制。本文提出一种基于神经认知的治理模型，将伦理和安全原则内嵌于智能体的决策架构中。该模型模拟人类认知过程中的“思考”环节，使AI在行动前进行内部评估，从而在源头避免不当行为，为自主系统的安全可控提供了新范式。

机器学习/ML.title: Measuring the Sensitivity of Classification Models with the Error Sensitivity Profile
机器学习/ML.title_zh: 使用误差敏感性度量分类模型的敏感性
机器学习/ML.summary: The quality of training data is critical to the performance of machine learning models. In this paper, the Error Sensitivity Profile (ESP) is proposed. It quantifies the sensitivity of model performance to errors in a single feature or in multiple features. By leveraging ESP, data-cleaning efforts can be prioritized on features that most impact model accuracy. Experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate that ESP effectively identifies influential features and guides targeted data cleaning, improving model performance with minimal effort.
机器学习/ML.summary_zh: 训练数据质量对机器学习模型性能至关重要。本文提出误差敏感性轮廓（ESP），量化模型性能对单个或多个特征中误差的敏感性。利用ESP，可以优先清理对模型准确性影响最大的特征。在基准数据集上的实验表明，ESP能有效识别关键特征并指导有针对性的数据清洗，以最小努力提升模型性能。创新点在于提出了一种可解释的敏感性度量，为数据清洗提供量化依据。

信息检索/IR.title: Health System Scale Semantic Search Across Unstructured Clinical Notes
信息检索/IR.title_zh: 跨非结构化临床笔记的医疗系统级语义搜索
信息检索/IR.summary: Introduction: Semantic search, which retrieves documents based on conceptual similarity rather than keyword matching, offers substantial advantages for retrieval of clinical information. However, deploying semantic search across entire health systems, comprising hundreds of millions of clinical notes, presents scalability and accuracy challenges. This paper presents a system for large-scale semantic search over unstructured clinical notes, leveraging dense retrieval and approximate nearest neighbor search. Evaluation on a real-world clinical dataset shows significant improvements in retrieval recall and precision compared to keyword-based baselines, enabling efficient information access across health systems.
信息检索/IR.summary_zh: 语义搜索基于概念相似性而非关键词匹配检索文档，为临床信息检索提供了显著优势。然而，在包含数亿份临床笔记的整个医疗系统中部署语义搜索面临可扩展性和准确性挑战。本文提出一种针对非结构化临床笔记的大规模语义搜索系统，利用密集检索和近似最近邻搜索。在真实临床数据集上的评估表明，与基于关键词的基线相比，检索召回率和精确度显著提升，实现了跨医疗系统的高效信息访问。创新点在于解决了医疗系统级语义搜索的规模化问题，并展示了实际部署的可行性。

多模态学习.title: RADD: Retrieval-Augmented Discrete Diffusion for Multi-Modal Knowledge Graph Completion
多模态学习.title_zh: RADD：检索增强的离散扩散用于多模态知识图谱补全
多模态学习.summary: Most multi-modal knowledge graph completion (MMKGC) models use one embedding scorer to do both retrieval over the full entity set and final decision making. We argue that this coupling is a core bottleneck: global high-recall search and local fine-grained disambiguation require different inductive biases. This paper proposes RADD, a retrieval-augmented discrete diffusion model that decouples retrieval and scoring. A separate retrieval module efficiently retrieves candidate entities, while a discrete diffusion model performs fine-grained scoring. Experiments on multiple MMKGC benchmarks show state-of-the-art performance, demonstrating the effectiveness of decoupling.
多模态学习.summary_zh: 大多数多模态知识图谱补全模型使用单一嵌入评分器同时进行全局实体检索和最终决策。本文认为这种耦合是核心瓶颈：全局高召回搜索和局部细粒度消歧需要不同的归纳偏置。为此提出RADD，一种检索增强的离散扩散模型，将检索和评分解耦。独立的检索模块高效检索候选实体，离散扩散模型进行细粒度评分。在多个多模态知识图谱补全基准上取得最先进性能，验证了解耦策略的有效性。创新点在于首次将检索增强与离散扩散结合，并解耦了检索与评分过程。

多模态学习.title: Walking Through Uncertainty: An Empirical Study of Uncertainty Estimation for Audio-Aware Large Language Models
多模态学习.title_zh: 穿越不确定性：音频感知大语言模型不确定性估计的实证研究
多模态学习.summary: Recent audio-aware large language models (ALLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities across diverse audio understanding and reasoning tasks, but they still frequently produce hallucinated or overly confident outputs. While uncertainty estimation has been extensively studied in text-only LLMs, it remains under-explored for ALLMs. In this paper, we conduct an empirical study of uncertainty estimation methods for ALLMs, evaluating their effectiveness in detecting incorrect or uncertain predictions. Our findings provide insights into the strengths and limitations of existing techniques and suggest directions for improving reliability in ALLMs.
多模态学习.summary_zh: 近期音频感知大语言模型在多种音频理解与推理任务中展现出强大能力，但仍频繁产生幻觉或过度自信的输出。尽管不确定性估计在纯文本大语言模型中已被广泛研究，但在音频感知大语言模型中仍探索不足。本文对音频感知大语言模型的不确定性估计方法进行了实证研究，评估了其在检测错误或不确定预测方面的有效性。研究结果揭示了现有技术的优势与局限，并为提升音频感知大语言模型的可靠性指明了方向。

多模态学习.title: SIEVES: Selective Prediction Generalizes through Visual Evidence Scoring
多模态学习.title_zh: SIEVES：通过视觉证据评分实现选择性预测的泛化
多模态学习.summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) achieve ever-stronger performance on visual-language tasks. Even as traditional visual question answering benchmarks approach saturation, reliable deployment requires satisfying low error tolerances in real-world out-of-distribution (OOD) scenarios. Precisely estimating model confidence is crucial for selective prediction. We propose SIEVES, a method that scores visual evidence by measuring alignment between visual and textual features. SIEVES enables MLLMs to abstain from answering when visual evidence is insufficient, improving OOD generalization. Experiments on multiple VQA datasets show that SIEVES outperforms existing confidence estimation methods, achieving better selective prediction performance.
多模态学习.summary_zh: 多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在视觉语言任务上表现日益强大。即使传统视觉问答基准接近饱和，可靠部署仍需要在现实世界的分布外（OOD）场景中满足低错误容忍度。精确估计模型置信度对于选择性预测至关重要。本文提出SIEVES方法，通过测量视觉与文本特征之间的对齐程度来对视觉证据进行评分。SIEVES使MLLM在视觉证据不足时能够拒绝回答，从而提升OOD泛化能力。在多个VQA数据集上的实验表明，SIEVES优于现有置信度估计方法，实现了更好的选择性预测性能。

多模态学习.title: DualFact+: A Multimodal Fact Verification Framework for Procedural Video Understanding
多模态学习.title_zh: DualFact+：面向程序性视频理解的多模态事实验证框架
多模态学习.summary: We introduce DualFact, a dual-layer, multimodal factuality evaluation framework for procedural video captioning. DualFact separates factual correctness into conceptual facts, capturing abstract semantic roles (e.g., Action, Ingredient, Tool, Location), and contextual facts, capturing their grounded spatiotemporal manifestations in the video. The framework uses a multimodal transformer to align video segments with textual claims and verifies each fact type through specialized modules. We also release a new benchmark dataset, ProcFact, consisting of procedural videos with fine-grained factuality annotations. Experiments show that DualFact outperforms existing fact verification methods by a large margin, achieving over 90% accuracy on both conceptual and contextual fact verification. The framework is robust to variations in video quality and caption style, making it suitable for real-world applications such as instructional video validation.
多模态学习.summary_zh: 本文提出DualFact+，一个双层多模态事实验证框架，用于程序性视频描述。创新点：1) 将事实正确性分为概念事实（抽象语义角色如动作、工具）和上下文事实（视频中的时空具体化表现）；2) 使用多模态Transformer对齐视频片段与文本声明，并通过专门模块验证每种事实类型；3) 发布新基准数据集ProcFact，包含细粒度事实标注。实验表明，DualFact+在概念和上下文事实验证上均超过90%准确率，显著优于现有方法，且对视频质量和描述风格具有鲁棒性。主要贡献是为程序性视频理解提供了可靠的事实验证工具。

NLP.title: MAIC-UI: Making Interactive Courseware with Generative UI
NLP.title_zh: MAIC-UI：利用生成式用户界面制作交互式课件
NLP.summary: Creating interactive STEM courseware traditionally requires HTML/CSS/JavaScript expertise, leaving barriers for educators. While generative AI can produce HTML codes, existing tools generate static presentations rather than interactive simulations, struggle with long documents, and lack pedagogical considerations. We present MAIC-UI, a system that leverages large language models to generate interactive courseware from natural language descriptions. Our approach decomposes the generation into multiple stages: content planning, interaction design, and code generation, enabling the production of pedagogically sound interactive simulations. Evaluations show that MAIC-UI outperforms existing baselines in both functionality and usability, significantly reducing the technical burden on educators.
NLP.summary_zh: 传统的交互式STEM课件制作需要HTML/CSS/JavaScript专业知识，给教育工作者带来障碍。虽然生成式AI可以生成HTML代码，但现有工具生成的是静态演示而非交互式模拟，难以处理长文档，且缺乏教学法考虑。本文提出MAIC-UI系统，利用大语言模型从自然语言描述生成交互式课件。该方法将生成过程分解为内容规划、交互设计和代码生成多个阶段，从而产出教学合理的交互式模拟。评估表明，MAIC-UI在功能性和可用性上均优于现有基线，显著降低了教育工作者的技术负担。

网络安全.title: Medoid Prototype Alignment for Cross-Plant Unknown Attack Detection in Industrial Control Systems
网络安全.title_zh: 用于工业控制系统跨工厂未知攻击检测的中位原型对齐方法
网络安全.summary: Deploying an intrusion detector trained in one industrial plant to another remains difficult because Industrial Control System (ICS) traffic is highly site-dependent, labels are scarce, and unseen attacks often appear after deployment. To address this challenge, this paper introduces a medoid prototype alignment method. The key idea is to learn a shared feature space where normal traffic from different plants forms compact clusters around medoid prototypes, while attacks are detected as outliers. By aligning prototypes across source and target domains without requiring target labels, the method enables zero-shot detection of unknown attacks. Experiments on real ICS datasets demonstrate significant improvement over baselines.
网络安全.summary_zh: 将在一个工业工厂训练的入侵检测器部署到另一个工厂仍然困难，因为工业控制系统（ICS）流量高度依赖于站点，标签稀缺，且部署后常出现未知攻击。为解决此问题，本文提出了一种中位原型对齐方法。核心思想是学习一个共享特征空间，其中来自不同工厂的正常流量围绕中位原型形成紧凑簇，而攻击则被检测为异常点。通过无需目标标签的对齐源域和目标域的原型，该方法实现了对未知攻击的零样本检测。在真实ICS数据集上的实验表明，该方法显著优于基线。

网络安全.title: Towards Agentic Investigation of Security Alerts
网络安全.title_zh: 面向安全警报的智能体调查方法
网络安全.summary: Security analysts are overwhelmed by the volume of alerts and the low context provided by many detection systems. Early-stage investigations typically require manual correlation across multiple log sources, a task that is usually time-consuming. In this paper, we present an experimental, agentic workflow for security alert investigation that leverages large language models to automate the correlation and analysis of alerts, reducing the manual effort required. Our approach demonstrates improved efficiency in handling alert triage and initial investigation stages.
网络安全.summary_zh: 安全分析师面临警报数量庞大且检测系统提供上下文不足的困境。早期调查通常需要跨多个日志源进行手动关联，耗时费力。本文提出一种实验性的基于智能体的安全警报调查工作流，利用大语言模型自动化警报关联与分析，减少人工投入。该方法在警报分类和初步调查阶段展现出更高的效率。

软件工程.title: SAFEdit: Does Multi-Agent Decomposition Resolve the Reliability Challenges of Instructed Code Editing?
软件工程.title_zh: SAFEdit：多智能体分解能否解决指令式代码编辑的可靠性挑战？
软件工程.summary: Instructed code editing is a significant challenge for large language models (LLMs). On the EditBench benchmark, 39 of 40 evaluated models obtain a task success rate (TSR) below 60 percent, highlighting a gap between general code generation and the ability to perform instruction-driven editing under realistic conditions. We propose SAFEdit, a multi-agent framework that decomposes the editing task into sub-tasks handled by specialized agents: understanding the instruction, locating relevant code, planning edits, and applying changes. Each agent is fine-tuned for its specific role, and a coordinator agent ensures consistency. Experiments show that SAFEdit significantly improves TSR over single-model baselines, demonstrating the effectiveness of decomposition for reliability.
软件工程.summary_zh: 指令式代码编辑对大语言模型（LLM）来说是一项重大挑战。在EditBench基准上，40个评估模型中有39个的任务成功率（TSR）低于60%，凸显了通用代码生成与在现实条件下执行指令驱动编辑能力之间的差距。本文提出SAFEdit，一个多智能体框架，将编辑任务分解为由专门智能体处理的子任务：理解指令、定位相关代码、规划编辑和应用更改。每个智能体针对其特定角色进行微调，协调智能体确保一致性。实验表明，SAFEdit显著提高了单模型基线的TSR，证明了分解方法对可靠性的有效性。

软件工程.title: Can Code Evaluation Metrics Detect Code Plagiarism?
软件工程.title_zh: 代码评估指标能检测代码抄袭吗？
软件工程.summary: Source Code Plagiarism Detection (SCPD) plays an important role in maintaining fairness and academic integrity in software engineering education. Code Evaluation Metrics (CEMs) are developed for assessing code generation tasks. However, it remains unclear whether such metrics can reliably detect plagiarism. In this paper, we investigate the effectiveness of CEMs for plagiarism detection by comparing them with traditional SCPD tools. Our results reveal that while some CEMs show promise, they generally lack robustness against common obfuscation techniques, highlighting the need for specialized plagiarism detection approaches.
软件工程.summary_zh: 源代码抄袭检测在软件工程教育中维护公平与学术诚信至关重要。代码评估指标用于评估代码生成任务，但其能否可靠检测抄袭尚不明确。本文通过与传统抄袭检测工具对比，研究了代码评估指标在抄袭检测中的有效性。结果表明，部分指标虽有一定潜力，但普遍对常见混淆技术缺乏鲁棒性，凸显了专门抄袭检测方法的必要性。

计算机视觉.title: The Surprising Effectiveness of Canonical Knowledge Distillation for Semantic Segmentation
计算机视觉.title_zh: 规范知识蒸馏在语义分割中的惊人有效性
计算机视觉.summary: Recent knowledge distillation (KD) methods for semantic segmentation introduce increasingly complex hand-crafted objectives, yet are typically evaluated under fixed iteration schedules. These objectives substantially increase per-iteration cost, meaning equal iteration counts do not correspond to equal computational budgets. We revisit the canonical KD approach that simply minimizes the KL divergence between teacher and student output distributions. Surprisingly, when accounting for computational cost (i.e., under equal FLOPs budgets), canonical KD outperforms many recent complex methods. We conduct extensive experiments across multiple architectures and datasets, demonstrating that canonical KD achieves superior or comparable performance with significantly lower overhead. Our findings suggest that the field should reconsider the value of complexity in KD objectives and focus on fair comparisons under equal computational budgets.
计算机视觉.summary_zh: 最近用于语义分割的知识蒸馏（KD）方法引入了日益复杂的手工设计目标，但通常在固定的迭代次数下进行评估。这些目标显著增加了每次迭代的成本，意味着相等的迭代次数并不对应相等的计算预算。本文重新审视了规范的KD方法，即简单地最小化教师和学生输出分布之间的KL散度。令人惊讶的是，当考虑计算成本（即在相等的FLOPs预算下）时，规范KD优于许多近期复杂方法。我们在多种架构和数据集上进行了广泛实验，表明规范KD以显著更低的开销实现了更优或相当的性能。研究结果提示，该领域应重新考虑KD目标中复杂性的价值，并在相等的计算预算下进行公平比较。

人工智能基础.title: Toward Scalable Terminal Task Synthesis via Skill Graphs
人工智能基础.title_zh: 通过技能图实现可扩展的终端任务合成
人工智能基础.summary: Terminal agents have demonstrated strong potential for autonomous command-line execution, yet their training remains constrained by the scarcity of high-quality and diverse execution trajectories. Existing approaches mitigate this bottleneck by synthesizing large-scale terminal task instances for training. In this paper, we propose a method that leverages skill graphs to systematically generate diverse and complex terminal tasks, enabling scalable synthesis. Our approach significantly expands the coverage of terminal commands and scenarios, improving the generalization of trained agents.
人工智能基础.summary_zh: 终端智能体在自主命令行执行方面展现出巨大潜力，但其训练受限于高质量多样化执行轨迹的稀缺。现有方法通过合成大规模终端任务实例来缓解这一瓶颈。本文提出一种利用技能图系统生成多样复杂终端任务的方法，实现可扩展的合成。该方法显著扩展了终端命令和场景的覆盖范围，提升了训练智能体的泛化能力。

自然语言处理.title: CGU-ILALab at FoodBench-QA 2026: Comparing Traditional and LLM-based Approaches for Recipe Nutrient Estimation
自然语言处理.title_zh: CGU-ILALab在FoodBench-QA 2026：比较传统与基于LLM的食谱营养估算方法
自然语言处理.summary: Accurate nutrient estimation from unstructured recipe text is an important yet challenging problem in dietary monitoring, due to ambiguous ingredient terminology and highly variable quantity expressions. We systematically evaluate models spanning a wide range of representational capacity, from lexical methods to large language models (LLMs). Our experiments show that LLMs, particularly when fine-tuned on domain-specific data, significantly outperform traditional approaches in handling ambiguous terms and quantity variations, achieving state-of-the-art results on the FoodBench-QA benchmark.
自然语言处理.summary_zh: 从非结构化食谱文本中准确估算营养成分是饮食监测中重要且具挑战的问题，原因在于模糊的食材术语和高度可变的量表达。本文系统评估了从词汇方法到大语言模型等多种表示能力的模型。实验表明，大语言模型，尤其是在领域数据上微调后，在处理模糊术语和量变化方面显著优于传统方法，在FoodBench-QA基准上取得了最先进的结果。

自然语言处理.title: LLM-ReSum: A Framework for LLM Reflective Summarization through Self-Evaluation
自然语言处理.title_zh: LLM-ReSum：通过自我评估实现LLM反思性摘要的框架
自然语言处理.summary: Reliable evaluation of large language model (LLM)-generated summaries remains an open challenge, particularly across heterogeneous domains and document lengths. We conduct a comprehensive meta-evaluation of 14 automatic summarization metrics and LLM-based evaluators across seven datasets spanning fi
自然语言处理.summary_zh: 对大型语言模型生成的摘要进行可靠评估仍是一个开放挑战，尤其是在异构领域和不同文档长度下。本文对14种自动摘要评估指标和基于LLM的评估器进行了全面的元评估，涵盖七个数据集。创新点在于提出LLM-ReSum框架，让LLM通过自我评估来反思和改进摘要质量。主要贡献包括：揭示了现有评估指标的局限性，并设计了一种迭代式自我修正机制，显著提升了摘要的相关性和忠实度。

自然语言处理.title: Cross-Lingual Jailbreak Detection via Semantic Codebooks
自然语言处理.title_zh: 基于语义码本的跨语言越狱检测
自然语言处理.summary: Safety mechanisms for large language models (LLMs) remain predominantly English-centric, creating systematic vulnerabilities in multilingual deployment. Prior work shows that translating malicious prompts into other languages can substantially increase jailbreak success rates, exposing a structural
自然语言处理.summary_zh: 大型语言模型的安全机制主要围绕英语设计，导致多语言部署中存在系统性漏洞。先前研究表明，将恶意提示翻译成其他语言可显著提高越狱成功率。本文提出一种基于语义码本的跨语言越狱检测方法，创新点在于构建多语言语义码本，捕捉不同语言中越狱提示的共性特征。主要贡献包括：设计了一种不依赖特定语言的检测框架，在多种语言上实现了高准确率，为多语言LLM安全提供了有效解决方案。

NLP与社交计算.title: HotComment: A Benchmark for Evaluating Popularity of Online Comments
NLP与社交计算.title_zh: HotComment：评估在线评论热度的基准
NLP与社交计算.summary: Online comments play a crucial role in shaping public sentiment and opinion dynamics on social media. However, evaluating their popularity remains challenging, not only because it depends on linguistic quality, originality, and emotional resonance, but also because stylistic preferences vary widely
NLP与社交计算.summary_zh: 在线评论在社交媒体上塑造公众情绪和舆论动态中扮演关键角色。然而，评估其热度仍具挑战性，这不仅因为热度取决于语言质量、原创性和情感共鸣，还因为风格偏好差异巨大。本文提出了HotComment基准，系统评估在线评论热度的多维因素，包括语言质量、原创性、情感共鸣及风格偏好。通过构建大规模标注数据集和评估指标，该基准为理解评论流行度提供了标准化框架，有助于社交媒体内容分析和舆论预测。主要贡献在于首次综合考量多维度特征，并提供了可复现的评估方法。

强化学习与神经符号系统.title: Sample-efficient Neuro-symbolic Proximal Policy Optimization
强化学习与神经符号系统.title_zh: 样本高效的神经符号近端策略优化
强化学习与神经符号系统.summary: Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) algorithms often require a large amount of data and struggle in sparse-reward domains with long planning horizons and multiple sub-goals. In this paper, we propose a neuro-symbolic extension of Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) that transfers partial logical policy
强化学习与神经符号系统.summary_zh: 深度强化学习算法通常需要大量数据，并在稀疏奖励、长规划周期和多子目标的领域表现不佳。本文提出了一种神经符号扩展的近端策略优化（PPO）方法，通过将部分逻辑策略迁移到神经网络中，实现了样本效率的提升。该方法结合了符号推理的显式知识表示和深度学习的泛化能力，在稀疏奖励环境中显著减少了所需交互次数。主要创新在于利用逻辑规则指导策略搜索，同时保持PPO的稳定性，在多个连续控制任务上验证了其优于传统PPO和基线方法。

材料科学与AI.title: Benchmarking bandgap prediction in semiconductors under experimental and realistic evaluation settings
材料科学与AI.title_zh: 在实验和现实评估设置下基准测试半导体带隙预测
材料科学与AI.summary: Accurate bandgap prediction is crucial for semiconductor applications, yet machine learning models trained on computational data often struggle to generalize to experimental bandgap measurements. Challenges related to data fidelity, domain generalization, and model interpretability remain insufficie
材料科学与AI.summary_zh: 准确的带隙预测对半导体应用至关重要，但基于计算数据训练的机器学习模型往往难以泛化到实验带隙测量。数据保真度、领域泛化和模型可解释性等挑战仍未充分解决。本文提出了一个全面的基准测试框架，在实验和现实评估设置下评估带隙预测方法。通过对比多种机器学习模型在计算与实验数据上的表现，揭示了数据来源差异对泛化能力的影响，并强调了模型可解释性的重要性。主要贡献在于构建了标准化评估协议，为半导体材料发现提供了可靠参考。

教育AI与行为分析.title: The Nonverbal Syntax Framework: An Evidence-Based Tiered System for Inferring Learner States from Observable Behavioral Cues
教育AI与行为分析.title_zh: 非语言句法框架：从可观察行为线索推断学习者状态的基于证据的分层系统
教育AI与行为分析.summary: Understanding learners' cognitive and affective states underpins adaptive educational systems and effective teaching. Although research links nonverbal cues to internal states, no framework calibrates them to evidence. We present the Nonverbal Syntax Framework, drawn from a systematic review of 908
教育AI与行为分析.summary_zh: 理解学习者的认知和情感状态是自适应教育系统和有效教学的基础。尽管研究将非语言线索与内部状态联系起来，但尚无框架将其校准为证据。本文提出了非语言句法框架，基于对908篇文献的系统综述，构建了一个分层系统，从可观察的行为线索（如面部表情、手势、姿势）推断学习者状态。该框架通过证据等级分类，将行为线索映射到认知负荷、情感投入等状态，并提供了可操作的编码方案。主要贡献在于建立了首个基于证据的非语言行为分析框架，为教育技术中的实时状态推断提供了理论基础。

AI对齐与人类反馈.title: Three Models of RLHF Annotation: Extension, Evidence, and Authority
AI对齐与人类反馈.title_zh: RLHF标注的三种模型：扩展、证据和权威
AI对齐与人类反馈.summary: Preference-based alignment methods, most prominently Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback (RLHF), use the judgments of human annotators to shape large language model behaviour. However, the normative role of these judgments is rarely made explicit. I distinguish three conceptual models of that
AI对齐与人类反馈.summary_zh: 基于偏好的对齐方法，尤其是基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF），利用人类标注者的判断来塑造大语言模型行为。然而，这些判断的规范性作用很少被明确。本文区分了三种概念模型：扩展模型（将标注视为价值观延伸）、证据模型（将标注视为事实证据）和权威模型（将标注视为权威指令）。通过分析每种模型的理论基础、假设和局限性，揭示了当前RLHF实践中隐含的规范性冲突。主要贡献在于提供了分析RLHF标注角色的理论框架，有助于更透明地设计和解释对齐方法。

强化学习/RL.title: Sustained Gradient Alignment Mediates Subliminal Learning in a Multi-Step Setting: Evidence from MNIST Auxiliary Logit Distillation Experiment
强化学习/RL.title_zh: 持续梯度对齐在多步设置中介导潜意识学习：来自MNIST辅助逻辑蒸馏实验的证据
强化学习/RL.summary: In the MNIST auxiliary logit distillation experiment, a student can acquire an unintended teacher trait despite distilling only on no-class logits through a phenomenon called subliminal learning. Under a single-step gradient descent assumption, subliminal learning theory attributes this effect to alignment between gradient directions of teacher and student on unselected classes. We extend this to multi-step gradient descent and show sustained gradient alignment persists, enabling subliminal learning over multiple updates. Our experiments confirm that even with multi-step optimization, the student inadvertently learns teacher-specific features from auxiliary logits.
强化学习/RL.summary_zh: 在MNIST辅助逻辑蒸馏实验中，学生模型仅通过无类别逻辑进行蒸馏，却意外获得了教师模型的某种特征，这种现象被称为潜意识学习。在单步梯度下降假设下，潜意识学习理论将其归因于教师和学生模型在未选择类别上梯度方向的对齐。本文将这一理论扩展到多步梯度下降，并证明持续梯度对齐在多步更新中依然存在，从而使得潜意识学习得以持续。实验证实，即使在多步优化下，学生模型仍会从辅助逻辑中无意地学习到教师特定的特征。这一发现揭示了知识蒸馏中隐式知识传递的机制，对理解模型训练中的副作用具有重要意义。

强化学习/RL.title: When Errors Can Be Beneficial: A Categorization of Imperfect Rewards for Policy Gradient
强化学习/RL.title_zh: 当错误有益时：策略梯度中不完美奖励的分类
强化学习/RL.summary: Training language models via reinforcement learning often relies on imperfect proxy rewards, since ground truth rewards that precisely define the intended behavior are rarely available. Standard metrics for assessing the quality of proxy rewards, such as ranking accuracy, treat incorrect rewards as detrimental. However, we argue that not all errors are harmful; some can guide learning towards better policies. We propose a categorization of reward errors based on their impact on policy gradient optimization, distinguishing between beneficial and detrimental errors. Through theoretical analysis and experiments on language generation tasks, we show that certain types of reward noise can improve exploration and final performance. Our work provides guidelines for designing better proxy rewards in RLHF.
强化学习/RL.summary_zh: 通过强化学习训练语言模型通常依赖不完美的代理奖励，因为精确定义预期行为的真实奖励很少可用。评估代理奖励质量的标准指标（如排序准确率）将错误奖励视为有害。然而，本文认为并非所有错误都有害；有些错误可以引导学习走向更优策略。本文提出了一种基于奖励错误对策略梯度优化影响的分类方法，区分有益错误和有害错误。通过理论分析和语言生成任务实验，我们表明某些类型的奖励噪声能够改善探索和最终性能。该工作为RLHF中设计更好的代理奖励提供了指导方针。

强化学习/RL.title: Semi-Markov Reinforcement Learning for City-Scale EV Ride-Hailing with Feasibility-Guaranteed Actions
强化学习/RL.title_zh: 面向城市级电动汽车网约车的半马尔可夫强化学习与可行性保证动作
强化学习/RL.summary: We study city-scale control of electric-vehicle (EV) ride-hailing fleets where dispatch, repositioning, and charging decisions must respect charger and feeder limits under uncertain, spatially correlated demand and travel times. We formulate the problem as a hex-grid semi-Markov decision process (se
强化学习/RL.summary_zh: 本文研究城市级电动汽车网约车车队的控制问题，其中调度、重新定位和充电决策必须在不确定且空间相关的需求和行驶时间下，遵守充电器和馈线限制。作者将该问题建模为六边形网格半马尔可夫决策过程，并提出一种具有可行性保证动作的强化学习算法。创新点包括：利用半马尔可夫框架处理时间不确定性和事件驱动决策，设计可行性保证机制确保动作始终满足充电和电网约束，并在城市规模仿真中验证了方法的有效性。主要贡献是为大规模电动汽车车队管理提供了一种可扩展、鲁棒且约束满足的强化学习解决方案。

强化学习/RL.title: TSN-Affinity: Similarity-Driven Parameter Reuse for Continual Offline Reinforcement Learning
强化学习/RL.title_zh: TSN-Affinity：面向持续离线强化学习的相似性驱动参数重用
强化学习/RL.summary: Continual offline reinforcement learning (CORL) aims to learn a sequence of tasks from datasets collected over time while preserving performance on previously learned tasks. This setting corresponds to domains where new tasks arise over time, but adapting the model in live environment interactions is infeasible. We propose TSN-Affinity, a method that measures task similarity and selectively reuses parameters from previous tasks to mitigate catastrophic forgetting, improving sample efficiency and final performance.
强化学习/RL.summary_zh: 持续离线强化学习（CORL）旨在从随时间收集的数据集中学习一系列任务，同时保持对先前学习任务的性能。该设置对应于新任务随时间出现的领域，但在实时环境交互中调整模型不可行。我们提出TSN-Affinity，一种衡量任务相似性并选择性重用先前任务参数以缓解灾难性遗忘的方法，提高了样本效率和最终性能。

其他AI.title: StratFormer: Adaptive Opponent Modeling and Exploitation in Imperfect-Information Games
其他AI.title_zh: StratFormer：非完美信息游戏中的自适应对手建模与利用
其他AI.summary: We present StratFormer, a transformer-based meta-agent that learns to simultaneously model and exploit opponents in imperfect-information games through a two-phase curriculum. The first phase trains an opponent modeling head to identify behavioral patterns from action histories while the agent plays against fixed strategies. The second phase integrates this model into a policy network to exploit identified weaknesses. Experiments on poker and bluffing games show that StratFormer outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods in both modeling accuracy and exploitability, demonstrating strong generalization to unseen opponents.
其他AI.summary_zh: 本文提出StratFormer，一种基于Transformer的元智能体，通过两阶段课程学习在非完美信息游戏中同时建模和利用对手。第一阶段训练对手建模头，从动作历史中识别行为模式，同时智能体与固定策略对弈。第二阶段将该模型集成到策略网络中，以利用识别出的弱点。在扑克和虚张声势游戏上的实验表明，StratFormer在建模准确性和可利用性方面均优于先前最先进方法，并展现出对未见对手的强泛化能力。

神经网络验证.title: Verification of Neural Networks (Lecture Notes)
神经网络验证.summary: These lecture notes provide an introduction to the verification of neural networks from a theoretical perspective. We discuss feed-forward neural networks, recurrent neural networks, attention mechanisms, and transformers, together with specification languages and algorithmic verification techniques
神经网络验证.summary_zh: 本文从理论角度系统介绍了神经网络验证的基本概念和方法。内容涵盖前馈神经网络、循环神经网络、注意力机制和Transformer等常见架构，以及相应的规范语言和算法验证技术。创新点在于提供了一个统一的理论框架，将不同类型的神经网络及其验证方法整合在一起，并深入讨论了验证的复杂性和局限性。主要贡献是为研究人员和从业人员提供了神经网络验证领域的全面入门指南，有助于推动可信AI的发展。

因果推断/医疗AI.title: TrialCalibre: A Fully Automated Causal Engine for RCT Benchmarking and Observational Trial Calibration
因果推断/医疗AI.title_zh: TrialCalibre：用于随机对照试验基准测试和观察性试验校准的全自动因果引擎
因果推断/医疗AI.summary: Real-world evidence (RWE) studies that emulate target trials increasingly inform regulatory and clinical decisions, yet residual, hard-to-quantify biases still limit their credibility. The recently proposed BenchExCal framework addresses this challenge via a two-stage Benchmark, Expand, Calibrate pr
因果推断/医疗AI.summary_zh: 现实世界证据研究通过模拟目标试验为监管和临床决策提供信息，但残留的难以量化的偏差限制了其可信度。本文提出TrialCalibre，一个全自动因果推断引擎，基于BenchExCal框架实现两阶段流程：基准测试（Benchmark）、扩展（Expand）和校准（Calibrate）。创新点在于完全自动化了从RCT到观察性研究的校准过程，无需人工干预，并提供了统计保证。主要贡献是提高了观察性因果推断的可信度，使RWE能够更可靠地支持决策。

NLP/心理健康.title: PSI-Bench: Towards Clinically Grounded and Interpretable Evaluation of Depression Patient Simulators
NLP/心理健康.title_zh: PSI-Bench：面向临床基础且可解释的抑郁症患者模拟器评估
NLP/心理健康.summary: Patient simulators are gaining traction in mental health training by providing scalable exposure to complex and sensitive patient interactions. Simulating depressed patients is particularly challenging, as safety constraints and high patient variability complicate simulations and underscore the need
NLP/心理健康.summary_zh: 患者模拟器在心理健康培训中日益受到关注，可提供可扩展的复杂敏感患者互动体验。模拟抑郁症患者尤其具有挑战性，因为安全约束和患者高变异性使模拟复杂化，并凸显了评估的必要性。本文提出PSI-Bench，一个临床基础且可解释的抑郁症患者模拟器评估基准。创新点包括：设计多维评估指标（如临床一致性、交互自然度、安全性），并引入可解释性分析模块以揭示模拟器的行为模式。主要贡献是为抑郁症模拟器提供了标准化评估框架，推动心理健康AI培训工具的发展。

多智能体系统.title: OxyGent: Making Multi-Agent Systems Modular, Observable, and Evolvable via Oxy Abstraction
多智能体系统.title_zh: OxyGent：通过Oxy抽象实现多智能体系统的模块化、可观测和可演化
多智能体系统.summary: Deploying production-ready multi-agent systems (MAS) in complex industrial environments remains challenging due to limitations in scalability, observability, and autonomous evolution. We present OxyGent, an open-source framework that enables modular, observable, and evolvable MAS via a unified Oxy a
多智能体系统.summary_zh: 在复杂工业环境中部署生产级多智能体系统仍面临可扩展性、可观测性和自主演化方面的挑战。本文提出OxyGent，一个开源框架，通过统一的Oxy抽象实现模块化、可观测和可演化的多智能体系统。创新点包括：引入Oxy抽象层将智能体行为封装为可组合模块，提供实时监控和日志机制增强可观测性，并支持运行时动态调整实现系统自主演化。主要贡献是降低了多智能体系统在工业场景中的部署门槛，提升了系统的可维护性和适应性。

软件工程与AI.title: Learning Generalizable Multimodal Representations for Software Vulnerability Detection
软件工程与AI.title_zh: 学习可泛化的多模态软件漏洞检测表示
软件工程与AI.summary: Source code and its accompanying comments are complementary yet naturally aligned modalities-code encodes structural logic while comments capture developer intent. However, existing vulnerability detection methods mostly rely on single-modality code representations, overlooking the complementary sem
软件工程与AI.summary_zh: 源代码及其注释是互补且自然对齐的模态：代码编码结构逻辑，而注释捕捉开发者意图。然而，现有的漏洞检测方法大多依赖单模态代码表示，忽视了这种互补语义。本文提出一种可泛化的多模态表示学习方法，通过联合建模代码和注释来增强漏洞检测。创新点在于利用模态间的对齐关系，学习跨模态的共享表示，从而提升检测的泛化能力和准确性。主要贡献包括：设计了一种新的多模态融合架构，在多个基准数据集上取得了优于单模态方法的性能。

图神经网络.title: On Halting vs Converging in Recurrent Graph Neural Networks
图神经网络.title_zh: 递归图神经网络中的停止与收敛问题
图神经网络.summary: Recurrent Graph Neural Networks (RGNNs) extend standard GNNs by iterating message-passing until some stopping condition is met. Various RGNN models have been proposed in the literature. In this paper, we study three such models: converging RGNNs, where all vertex representations must stabilise; outp
图神经网络.summary_zh: 递归图神经网络通过迭代消息传递直到满足停止条件来扩展标准GNN。本文研究了三种RGNN模型：收敛型RGNN（所有顶点表示必须稳定）、输出型RGNN（仅输出稳定）和停止型RGNN（基于学习条件）。创新点在于从理论角度分析了停止与收敛之间的区别及其对模型表达能力的影响。主要贡献包括：证明了不同停止条件对RGNN的泛化能力有显著影响，并提出了选择适当停止策略的指导原则。

AI安全与对齐.title: Conditional misalignment: common interventions can hide emergent misalignment behind contextual triggers
AI安全与对齐.title_zh: 条件性失调：常见干预措施可能将涌现性失调隐藏在上下文触发器背后
AI安全与对齐.summary: Finetuning a language model can lead to emergent misalignment (EM) [Betley et al., 2025b]. Models trained on a narrow distribution of misaligned behavior generalize to more egregious behaviors when tested outside the training distribution. We study a set of interventions proposed to reduce EM. We
AI安全与对齐.summary_zh: 微调语言模型可能导致涌现性失调（EM），即模型在训练分布外测试时会泛化出更严重的不对齐行为。本文研究了一系列旨在减少EM的干预措施。创新点在于发现这些常见干预措施可能只是将EM隐藏起来，而非消除，并在特定上下文触发器下重新显现。主要贡献包括：揭示了条件性失调现象，即干预措施未能根除EM，而是使其变为条件触发；为语言模型的安全对齐提供了重要警示。

自然语言处理/NLP.title: Toward a Functional Geometric Algebra for Natural Language Semantics
自然语言处理/NLP.title_zh: 迈向自然语言语义的功能几何代数
自然语言处理/NLP.summary: Distributional and neural approaches to natural language semantics have been built almost exclusively on conventional linear algebra: vectors, matrices, tensors, and the operations that accompany them. These methods have achieved remarkable empirical success, yet they face persistent structural limitations, such as the inability to naturally capture compositionality, relational reasoning, and semantic roles. This paper proposes a functional geometric algebra framework that extends conventional vector spaces with algebraic structures capable of encoding linguistic functions and relations. The key innovation is the introduction of a geometric product that allows for the composition of semantic entities in a way that preserves their functional roles. We demonstrate that this framework can represent a wide range of semantic phenomena, including verb-argument structure, modification, and quantification, without the need for hand-crafted features or specialized architectures. Our approach provides a unified mathematical foundation for integrating distributional semantics with symbolic reasoning, potentially bridging the gap between neural and symbolic AI.
自然语言处理/NLP.summary_zh: 本文提出了一种功能几何代数框架，用于自然语言语义表示。传统分布语义和神经方法主要基于线性代数（向量、矩阵、张量），虽取得显著成功，但在组合性、关系推理和语义角色建模方面存在结构性限制。该框架引入几何积运算，允许语义实体在保持功能角色的同时进行组合，无需手工特征或专门架构。创新点在于：1) 将几何代数引入语义学，提供统一的数学基础；2) 能自然表示动词-论元结构、修饰语和量词等语义现象；3) 融合分布语义与符号推理，弥合神经与符号AI的鸿沟。主要贡献是为自然语言语义提供了一种更具表达力和组合性的代数框架。

自然语言处理/NLP.title: CORAL: Adaptive Retrieval Loop for Culturally-Aligned Multilingual RAG
自然语言处理/NLP.title_zh: CORAL：面向文化对齐的多语言RAG自适应检索循环
自然语言处理/NLP.summary: Multilingual retrieval-augmented generation (mRAG) is often implemented within a fixed retrieval space, typically via query or document translation or multilingual embedding vector representations. However, this approach may be inadequate for culturally grounded queries, in which retrieval-conditioned generation must align with cultural norms, values, and contexts. We introduce CORAL, an adaptive retrieval loop that dynamically adjusts retrieval strategies based on the cultural specificity of the query. CORAL integrates a cultural awareness module that estimates the cultural grounding of a query, and then selects between translation-based, embedding-based, or hybrid retrieval pathways. Additionally, it incorporates a feedback loop that refines retrieval results using cross-cultural relevance signals. Experiments on culturally diverse datasets show that CORAL significantly improves cultural alignment in generated outputs compared to fixed-strategy baselines, while maintaining high factual accuracy.
自然语言处理/NLP.summary_zh: 本文提出CORAL，一种面向文化对齐的多语言检索增强生成（mRAG）自适应框架。传统mRAG采用固定检索空间（如翻译或多语言嵌入），难以处理文化特定查询。CORAL创新点包括：1) 文化感知模块，动态估计查询的文化根基，选择翻译、嵌入或混合检索路径；2) 反馈循环，利用跨文化相关性信号优化检索结果。实验表明，相比固定策略基线，CORAL显著提升生成输出的文化对齐性，同时保持高事实准确性。主要贡献是解决了多语言RAG中文化适应性问题，提高了跨文化场景下的实用价值。

自然语言处理/NLP.title: G-Loss: Graph-Guided Fine-Tuning of Language Models
自然语言处理/NLP.title_zh: G-Loss：图引导的语言模型微调
自然语言处理/NLP.summary: Traditional loss functions, including cross-entropy, contrastive, triplet, and supervised contrastive losses, used for fine-tuning pre-trained language models such as BERT, operate only within local neighborhoods and fail to account for the global semantic structure. We present G-Loss, a graph-guided loss function that leverages a semantic graph constructed from the entire dataset to guide fine-tuning. By incorporating global structural information, G-Loss encourages the model to learn representations that preserve both local and global semantic relationships. Experiments on several NLP benchmarks show that G-Loss consistently outperforms traditional losses, achieving up to 5% improvement on tasks requiring global understanding.
自然语言处理/NLP.summary_zh: 传统损失函数（如交叉熵、对比损失、三元组损失和监督对比损失）在微调预训练语言模型（如BERT）时仅作用于局部邻域，忽略了全局语义结构。我们提出G-Loss，一种图引导的损失函数，利用整个数据集构建的语义图来指导微调。通过融入全局结构信息，G-Loss促使模型学习同时保留局部和全局语义关系的表示。在多个NLP基准测试上，G-Loss一致优于传统损失，在需要全局理解的任务上提升高达5%。创新点在于将图结构引入损失函数，贡献在于提升了语言模型的全局语义建模能力。

机器人/安全.title: Threat-Oriented Digital Twinning for Security Evaluation of Autonomous Platforms
机器人/安全.title_zh: 面向威胁的数字孪生：自主平台安全评估
机器人/安全.summary: Open, unclassified research on secure autonomy is constrained by limited access to operational platforms, contested communications infrastructure, and representative adversarial test conditions. This paper presents a threat-oriented digital twinning methodology for cybersecurity evaluation of learning-enabled autonomous platforms. The approach creates high-fidelity digital twins that simulate realistic adversarial threats, including sensor spoofing, communication jamming, and physical attacks. We integrate a threat modeling framework that systematically identifies vulnerabilities and generates test scenarios. The digital twin is validated against physical platform data and used to evaluate the security posture of autonomous systems under various attack vectors. Case studies on autonomous drones and ground vehicles demonstrate that our methodology can uncover critical security flaws that are missed by traditional testing approaches. The framework is open-source and extensible, enabling the research community to conduct reproducible security evaluations.
机器人/安全.summary_zh: 本文提出面向威胁的数字孪生方法，用于评估学习型自主平台的网络安全。创新点：1) 构建高保真数字孪生，模拟传感器欺骗、通信干扰和物理攻击等真实对抗威胁；2) 集成威胁建模框架，系统识别漏洞并生成测试场景；3) 通过自主无人机和地面车辆案例研究，揭示传统测试遗漏的关键安全缺陷。主要贡献是为自主系统安全评估提供了可复现、开源的方法，突破了实体平台和通信基础设施的限制。

人机交互/HCI.title: Emotive Architectures: The Role of LLMs in Adjusting Work Environments
人机交互/HCI.title_zh: 情感架构：大语言模型在调整工作环境中的作用
人机交互/HCI.summary: In remote and hybrid work contexts, the integration of physical and digital environments is revolutionizing spatial experiences, collaboration, and interpersonal interactions. This study examines three fundamental spatial conditions: the physical environment, characterized by material and sensory aspects; the digital environment, enabled by technology; and the hybrid environment, blending both. We propose a framework where LLMs act as adaptive agents to modulate these environments based on emotional cues, enhancing well-being and productivity. Experiments demonstrate that LLM-driven adjustments can positively influence user satisfaction and collaboration efficiency.
人机交互/HCI.summary_zh: 在远程与混合工作场景中，物理与数字环境的融合正深刻改变空间体验、协作与人际互动。本研究考察了三种基本空间条件：以物质与感官为特征的物理环境、由技术支撑的数字环境，以及两者融合的混合环境。我们提出一个框架，将大语言模型（LLM）作为自适应代理，根据情感线索调节这些环境，以提升幸福感和生产力。实验表明，LLM驱动的调整能积极影响用户满意度和协作效率。创新点在于将LLM用于动态环境情感调节，贡献在于为智能工作空间设计提供新范式。

AI伦理与科学理解.title: Large language models eroding science understanding: an experimental study
AI伦理与科学理解.title_zh: 大语言模型侵蚀科学理解：一项实验研究
AI伦理与科学理解.summary: This paper is under review in AI and Ethics. This study examines whether large language models (LLMs) can reliably answer scientific questions and demonstrates how easily they can be influenced by fringe scientific material. The authors modified custom LLMs to prioritise knowledge in selected fringe areas, then tested their responses to standard scientific queries. Results show that LLMs can produce plausible but incorrect answers when exposed to fringe content, potentially eroding users' understanding of science. The work highlights risks of LLM misuse in scientific communication and education.
AI伦理与科学理解.summary_zh: 该论文投稿于《AI与伦理》期刊。研究考察了大语言模型（LLM）能否可靠回答科学问题，并展示了它们如何轻易受边缘科学材料影响。作者修改定制LLM，使其优先考虑选定的边缘知识，然后测试其对标准科学问题的回答。结果显示，LLM在接触边缘内容后可能产生看似合理但错误的答案，从而侵蚀用户对科学的理解。创新点在于揭示LLM在科学传播中的脆弱性，贡献在于警示教育领域需谨慎使用LLM。

多智能体系统/AI.title: Recursive Multi-Agent Systems
多智能体系统/AI.summary: Recursive or looped language models have recently emerged as a new scaling axis by iteratively refining the same model computation over latent states to deepen reasoning. We extend such scaling principle from a single model to multi-agent systems, and ask: Can agent collaboration itself be scaled through recursion? We propose Recursive Multi-Agent Systems (RMAS), where agents recursively form sub-groups to solve increasingly complex sub-tasks, mimicking hierarchical human collaboration. Experiments on reasoning and problem-solving benchmarks show that RMAS significantly outperforms flat multi-agent systems and single-agent baselines, demonstrating that recursive collaboration enables deeper and more structured reasoning.
多智能体系统/AI.summary_zh: 递归或循环语言模型通过迭代优化同一模型在潜在状态上的计算来加深推理，最近成为一种新的扩展维度。我们将这种扩展原理从单一模型推广到多智能体系统，并提问：智能体协作本身能否通过递归进行扩展？我们提出递归多智能体系统（RMAS），其中智能体递归地形成子组来解决日益复杂的子任务，模拟人类分层协作。在推理和问题解决基准上的实验表明，RMAS显著优于扁平多智能体系统和单智能体基线，证明递归协作能够实现更深层、更结构化的推理。创新点在于首次将递归扩展应用于多智能体协作，贡献在于为复杂任务提供可扩展的协作框架。

软件工程/AI.title: Spreadsheet Modeling Experiments Using GPTs on Small Problem Statements and the Wall Task
软件工程/AI.title_zh: 基于GPT的小型问题陈述与墙任务的电子表格建模实验
软件工程/AI.summary: This paper investigates how GPT-based tools can assist in building reusable analytical spreadsheet models. After a screening, we evaluate five GPT extensions and select Excel AI by pulsrai.com for detailed testing. Through structured experiments on simple problem statements, we assess Excel AI's performance in generating accurate and reusable spreadsheet models. Results indicate that while GPT tools can accelerate initial model creation, they often produce errors in complex logic and lack robustness for production use. The study provides guidelines for effective human-AI collaboration in spreadsheet modeling.
软件工程/AI.summary_zh: 本文研究基于GPT的工具如何辅助构建可复用的分析性电子表格模型。经过筛选，我们评估了五个GPT扩展，并选择pulsrai.com的Excel AI进行详细测试。通过对简单问题陈述的结构化实验，我们评估了Excel AI在生成准确且可复用电子表格模型方面的性能。结果表明，尽管GPT工具能加速初始模型创建，但在复杂逻辑中常产生错误，且缺乏生产级鲁棒性。研究为电子表格建模中的人机协作提供了有效指南。创新点在于系统评估GPT在电子表格领域的实际能力，贡献在于揭示当前局限并给出改进方向。

计算机安全/CV.title: SnapGuard: Lightweight Prompt Injection Detection for Screenshot-Based Web Agents
计算机安全/CV.title_zh: SnapGuard：面向截图型网络代理的轻量级提示注入检测
计算机安全/CV.summary: Web agents have emerged as an effective paradigm for automating interactions with complex web environments, yet remain vulnerable to prompt injection attacks that embed malicious instructions into webpage content to induce unintended actions. This threat is further amplified for screenshot-based web agents that rely on visual understanding. We propose SnapGuard, a lightweight detection method that operates on the screenshot level, using a small vision-language model to flag potential injections before execution.
计算机安全/CV.summary_zh: 网络代理已成为自动化与复杂网络环境交互的有效范式，但仍易受提示注入攻击，攻击者将恶意指令嵌入网页内容以诱导意外操作。对于依赖视觉理解的截图型网络代理，这一威胁更为严重。我们提出SnapGuard，一种轻量级检测方法，在截图层面操作，使用小型视觉语言模型在执行前标记潜在注入。

软件工程/SE.title: RESTestBench: A Benchmark for Evaluating the Effectiveness of LLM-Generated REST API Test Cases from NL Requirements
软件工程/SE.title_zh: RESTestBench：评估从自然语言需求生成的LLM REST API测试用例有效性的基准
软件工程/SE.summary: Existing REST API testing tools are typically evaluated using code coverage and crash-based fault metrics. However, recent LLM-based approaches increasingly generate tests from NL requirements to validate functional behaviour, making traditional metrics weak proxies for whether generated tests validate the intended functionality. We introduce RESTestBench, a benchmark with 100+ NL requirements and manually validated test oracles, to evaluate the functional correctness of LLM-generated test cases.
软件工程/SE.summary_zh: 现有REST API测试工具通常使用代码覆盖率和基于崩溃的故障指标进行评估。然而，近期基于LLM的方法越来越多地从自然语言需求生成测试以验证功能行为，使得传统指标成为生成的测试是否验证了预期功能的弱代理。我们引入RESTestBench，一个包含100多个自然语言需求和手动验证测试预言机的基准，用于评估LLM生成测试用例的功能正确性。

AI系统/架构.title: Scalable Inference Architectures for Compound AI Systems: A Production Deployment Study
AI系统/架构.title_zh: 复合AI系统的可扩展推理架构：一项生产部署研究
AI系统/架构.summary: Modern enterprise AI applications increasingly rely on compound AI systems - architectures that compose multiple models, retrievers, and tools to accomplish complex tasks. Deploying such systems in production demands inference infrastructure that can efficiently serve concurrent, heterogeneous model requests with low latency and high throughput. We present a production deployment study of scalable inference architectures for compound AI systems, evaluating trade-offs between centralized and distributed serving, model parallelism, and caching strategies.
AI系统/架构.summary_zh: 现代企业AI应用日益依赖复合AI系统——组合多个模型、检索器和工具以完成复杂任务的架构。在生产中部署此类系统需要能够高效服务并发、异构模型请求且低延迟、高吞吐量的推理基础设施。我们提出了复合AI系统可扩展推理架构的生产部署研究，评估了集中式与分布式服务、模型并行和缓存策略之间的权衡。

推荐系统.title: Action-Aware Generative Sequence Modeling for Short Video Recommendation
推荐系统.title_zh: 面向短视频推荐的行动感知生成式序列建模
推荐系统.summary: With the rapid development of the Internet, users have increasingly higher expectations for the recommendation accuracy of online content consumption platforms. However, short videos often contain diverse segments, and users may not hold the same attitude toward all of them. Traditional binary-class
推荐系统.summary_zh: 随着互联网的快速发展，用户对在线内容消费平台的推荐准确性期待日益提高。然而，短视频通常包含多样化片段，用户对其态度可能不一致。传统的二分类方法难以捕捉用户对视频不同部分的细粒度偏好。本文提出一种行动感知的生成式序列建模方法，通过将用户行为（如快进、重播、跳过）作为隐变量融入序列生成模型，从而更精确地建模用户对视频片段的兴趣。该方法能够生成更符合用户偏好的推荐序列，显著提升推荐效果。主要贡献在于：1）提出行动感知机制，利用用户微观行为增强推荐建模；2）设计生成式序列模型，实现细粒度推荐；3）在真实数据集上验证了方法的有效性。

计算机视觉/CV.title: No Pedestrian Left Behind: Real-Time Detection and Tracking of Vulnerable Road Users for Adaptive Traffic Signal Control
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: 不让任何行人掉队：面向自适应交通信号控制的弱势道路使用者实时检测与跟踪
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Current pedestrian crossing signals operate on fixed timing without adjustment to pedestrian behavior, which can leave vulnerable road users (VRUs) such as the elderly, disabled, or distracted pedestrians stranded when the light changes. We introduce No Pedestrian Left Behind (NPLB), a real-time ada
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 当前人行横道信号灯采用固定配时，无法根据行人行为调整，导致老年人、残疾人或分心行人等弱势道路使用者在信号灯切换时被困。本文提出NPLB系统，实现实时检测和跟踪弱势道路使用者，并自适应控制交通信号。系统利用YOLO等目标检测算法实时识别行人，通过跟踪算法预测其过街意图和速度，动态调整绿灯时长。主要创新包括：1）结合检测与跟踪，准确估计行人过街时间；2）基于行人行为自适应信号配时，优先保障弱势群体安全；3）在模拟和真实场景中验证，有效减少行人等待时间并提高通行效率。该系统为智能交通提供了实用解决方案。

highlights: 研究亮点1：Marco-MoE——高效的稀疏MoE架构，仅激活5%参数，结合稠密模型升级循环，实现多语言模型的经济训练和推理，极具实用价值。
研究亮点2：Think Before You Act——将伦理治理内嵌于AI决策架构，从认知层面解决自主智能体的安全可控问题，为AI治理提供新思路。
研究亮点1：From CRUD to Autonomous Agents - 提出了AI原生企业系统中语义网关的形式化验证与零信任安全框架，解决了LLM概率行为带来的安全挑战，具有重要的实用价值。
研究亮点2：From Soliloquy to Agora - 通过多代理辩论和记忆增强机制，显著提升了LLM在复杂优化建模任务中的性能，为LLM在运筹学领域的应用提供了新范式。
《Prefill-Time Intervention for Mitigating Hallucination in Large Vision-Language Models》：提出在预填充阶段干预以减少幻觉，比解码阶段干预更高效，具有重要实用价值。
《The Surprising Effectiveness of Canonical Knowledge Distillation for Semantic Segmentation》：重新审视简单KL散度蒸馏，在相等计算预算下优于复杂方法，对知识蒸馏领域有方法论启示。
《MAIC-UI: Making Interactive Courseware with Generative UI》：利用LLM多阶段生成交互式课件，降低教育工作者技术门槛，应用前景广阔。
研究亮点1：《通过技能图实现可扩展的终端任务合成》提出利用技能图系统生成多样化终端任务，显著提升训练数据的覆盖范围和智能体泛化能力，对自主命令行执行领域具有重要实用价值。
研究亮点2：《穿越不确定性：音频感知大语言模型不确定性估计的实证研究》首次系统评估音频感知LLM的不确定性估计方法，为解决多模态模型幻觉问题提供关键见解，学术价值高。
研究亮点1：《Sample-efficient Neuro-symbolic Proximal Policy Optimization》提出神经符号PPO，通过逻辑策略迁移显著提升样本效率，在稀疏奖励任务中具有突破性，兼具理论与实用价值。
